name: jenki-build
title: JenkiBuild
description: Search and trigger Jenkins builds without leaving the keyboard
author: manohar_yekkala

preferences.name: jenkinsUrl
preferences.title: Jenkins URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your Jenkins instance (e.g. https://jenkins.example.com)

preferences.name: defaultJobPath
preferences.title: Default Job Path
preferences.description: Optional job path to pre-select on open

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use the \`npm run publish\` script.

" && exit 1
